title: ISC Credit Puller input
description: One-shot credit pull against iscsite.meridianlink.com. The actor logs in with the broker's stored ISC credentials, pauses for the broker to clear MFA via Apify Live View if challenged, fills the order form with borrower data, fills the broker-supplied credit card on the payment screen, downloads the resulting PDF, and best-effort scrapes the bureau scores.

iscPassword.title: ISC password
iscPassword.description: The broker's iscsite.meridianlink.com password. Used once per run, never logged.

loginUrl.title: Login URL
loginUrl.description: ISC login page URL. Override only for testing against a non-production endpoint.

mfaTimeoutSec.title: MFA wait timeout (seconds)
mfaTimeoutSec.description: How long to give the broker to enter the SMS code via Live View before failing the run.

borrower.title: Borrower
borrower.description: Borrower data filled into ISC's order form. Required fields: firstName, lastName, ssn, dob (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: phone, email, addressStreet, addressCity, addressState, addressZip.

card.title: Credit card (passed through to ISC's payment screen)
card.description: Required fields: number, expMonth, expYear, cvc, zip. Optional: name. Used once and discarded; the actor never persists card data.

proxy.title: Outbound HTTP proxy (optional)
proxy.description: If set, all Chromium traffic routes through this proxy. Used to give every run the same egress IP so MeridianLink can whitelist it and skip MFA. Fields: server (http://host:port), username, password.
